mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_action_master WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_action_master ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{compId}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT taop.*, taco.company_objective, taco.created_at, tcd1.minor_nm as performance_type_nm, tcd2.minor_nm as performance_repeat_nm, COALESCE(SUM(tap.budget), 0) AS budget FROM esg.tb_action_master tam LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_objective_plan taop ON tam.write_year = taop.write_year AND tam.doc_type = taop.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = taop.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = taop.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_company_objective taco ON taco.comp_objective_id = taop.comp_objective_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_plan tadp ON tam.write_year = tadp.write_year AND tam.doc_type = tadp.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = tadp.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = tadp.comp_id AND taop.doc_seq = tadp.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d tcd1 ON taop.performance_type = tcd1.minor_cd AND tcd1.major_cd = 'C0011' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d tcd2 ON taop.performance_repeat = tcd2.minor_cd AND tcd2.major_cd = 'C0012' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_map tom ON tom.target_id = taop.write_year || taop.doc_no || taop.doc_seq -- 조직 매핑 데이터 AND tom.target_type = taop.doc_type AND tom.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_performance tap -- 실적 ON tam.write_year = tap.write_year AND tam.doc_type = tap.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = tap.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = tap.comp_id AND tadp.doc_seq = tap.doc_seq AND tadp.doc_detail_seq = tap.doc_detail_seq AND tom.orgn_id = tap.orgn_id WHERE taop.comp_id = #{compId} AND taop.write_year = #{writeYear} GROUP BY taop.write_year, taop.doc_type, taop.doc_no, taop.doc_seq , taop.comp_objective_id, taco.company_objective, taop.action_objective, taop.performance_type, taop.performance_repeat, taop.performance_cnt, taop.performance_custom, taop.remark, taop.ord_seq, taop.use_yn, taop.action_schedule1, taop.action_schedule2, taop.action_schedule3, taop.action_schedule4, taop.created_at, taop.created_by, taop.updated_at, taop.updated_by, taop.comp_id, tcd1.minor_nm, tcd2.minor_nm, taco.created_at ORDER BY taco.created_at, taop.use_yn DESC, taop.write_year, taop.ord_seq, taop.doc_no, taop.doc_seq

SELECT taop.*, COALESCE(SUM(tap.budget), 0) AS budget, taco.company_objective FROM esg.tb_action_master tam LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_objective_plan taop ON tam.write_year = taop.write_year AND tam.doc_type = taop.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = taop.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = taop.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_company_objective taco ON taco.comp_objective_id = taop.comp_objective_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_plan tadp ON tam.write_year = tadp.write_year AND tam.doc_type = tadp.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = tadp.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = tadp.comp_id AND taop.doc_seq = tadp.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d tcd1 ON taop.performance_type = tcd1.minor_cd AND tcd1.major_cd = 'C0011' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_map tom ON tom.target_id = taop.write_year || taop.doc_no || taop.doc_seq -- 조직 매핑 데이터 AND tom.target_type = taop.doc_type AND tom.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_performance tap -- 실적 ON tam.write_year = tap.write_year AND tam.doc_type = tap.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = tap.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = tap.comp_id AND tadp.doc_seq = tap.doc_seq AND tadp.doc_detail_seq = tap.doc_detail_seq AND tom.orgn_id = tap.orgn_id WHERE taop.comp_id = #{compId} AND taop.write_year = #{writeYear} AND taop.doc_no = #{docNo} AND taop.doc_type = #{docType} AND taop.doc_seq = #{docSeq} GROUP BY taop.write_year, taop.doc_type, taop.doc_no, taop.doc_seq , taop.comp_objective_id, taco.company_objective, taop.action_objective, taop.performance_type, taop.performance_repeat, taop.performance_cnt, taop.performance_custom, taop.remark, taop.ord_seq, taop.use_yn, taop.action_schedule1, taop.action_schedule2, taop.action_schedule3, taop.action_schedule4, taop.created_at, taop.created_by, taop.updated_at, taop.updated_by, taop.comp_id, tcd1.minor_nm

SELECT DISTINCT toi.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm FROM ESG.tb_action_detail_plan tadp LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_health_objectives_detail tsho ON tsho.write_year = tadp.write_year AND tsho.action_doc_type = tadp.doc_type AND tsho.action_doc_no = tadp.doc_no AND tsho.action_doc_seq = tadp.doc_seq AND tsho.action_doc_detail_seq = tadp.doc_detail_seq AND tsho.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_safety_health_objectives tsh ON tsh.write_year = tsho.write_year AND tsh.doc_type = tsho.doc_type AND tsh.doc_no = tsho.doc_no LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON tsho.orgn_id = toi.orgn_id WHERE tadp.comp_id = #{compId} AND tadp.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tadp.doc_type = #{docType} AND tadp.doc_no = #{docNo} AND tadp.doc_seq = #{docSeq} AND tadp.use_yn = 'Y' AND tsh.use_yn = 'Y' AND tsho.orgn_id IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert:
SELECT #{writeYear} as writeYear, LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_action_objective_plan WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_action_objective_plan ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, comp_objective_id, action_objective, performance_type, performance_repeat, performance_cnt, performance_custom, remark, ord_seq, use_yn, action_schedule1, action_schedule2, action_schedule3, action_schedule4, comp_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{compObjectiveId}, #{actionObjective}, #{performanceType}, #{performanceRepeat}, #{performanceCnt}, #{performanceCustom}, #{remark}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, #{actionSchedule1}, #{actionSchedule2}, #{actionSchedule3}, #{actionSchedule4}, #{compId}, now(), #{createdBy} )

select to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad( (coalesce(max(substring(comp_objective_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0' ) as comp_objective_id from esg.tb_action_company_objective where comp_objective_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_action_company_objective ( comp_objective_id, company_objective, comp_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compObjectiveId}, #{companyObjective}, #{compId}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_action_objective_plan SET action_objective = #{actionObjective}, performance_type = #{performanceType}, performance_repeat = #{performanceRepeat}, performance_cnt = #{performanceCnt}, performance_custom = #{performanceCustom}, remark = #{remark}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, use_yn = #{useYn}, action_schedule1 = #{actionSchedule1}, action_schedule2 = #{actionSchedule2}, action_schedule3 = #{actionSchedule3}, action_schedule4 = #{actionSchedule4}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type= #{docType} AND doc_no= #{docNo} AND doc_seq= #{docSeq}
mapper.select:
SELECT tadp.write_year, tadp.doc_type, tadp.doc_no, tadp.doc_seq, tadp.doc_detail_seq, tadp.comp_id, tadp.detail_item_id, tadp.detail_plan, tadp.performance_type, tadp.performance_repeat, tadp.performance_cnt, tadp.performance_custom, tadp.remark, tadp.ord_seq, -- tadp.use_yn, tadp.action_schedule1, tadp.action_schedule2, tadp.action_schedule3, tadp.action_schedule4, tadp.action_schedule5, tadp.action_schedule6, tadp.action_schedule7, tadp.action_schedule8, tadp.action_schedule9, tadp.action_schedule10, tadp.action_schedule11, tadp.action_schedule12, tadp.created_at, tadp.created_by, tadp.updated_at, tadp.updated_by, taco.company_objective, taco.created_at, taop.action_objective, taop.comp_objective_id, taop.action_schedule1 as action_schedule1_o, taop.action_schedule2 as action_schedule2_o, taop.action_schedule3 as action_schedule3_o, taop.action_schedule4 as action_schedule4_o, taop.performance_type as performance_type_o, taop.performance_repeat as performance_repeat_o, taop.performance_cnt as performance_cnt_o, taop.performance_custom as performance_custom_o, taop.doc_seq as doc_seq_o, taop.write_year as write_year_o, taop.doc_type as doc_type_o, taop.doc_no as doc_no_o, tcd1.minor_nm as performance_type_nm, tcd2.minor_nm as performance_repeat_nm, tadi.detail_item, CASE WHEN taop.use_yn = 'N' THEN 'N' WHEN tadp.use_yn = 'N' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS use_yn, COALESCE(SUM(tap.budget), 0) AS budget FROM esg.tb_action_master tam LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_objective_plan taop ON tam.write_year = taop.write_year AND tam.doc_type = taop.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = taop.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = taop.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_plan tadp ON tam.write_year = tadp.write_year AND tam.doc_type = tadp.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = tadp.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = tadp.comp_id AND taop.doc_seq = tadp.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_company_objective taco ON taco.comp_objective_id = taop.comp_objective_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_item tadi on tadi.detail_item_id = tadp.detail_item_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d tcd1 ON tadp.performance_type = tcd1.minor_cd AND tcd1.major_cd = 'C0011' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d tcd2 ON tadp.performance_repeat = tcd2.minor_cd AND tcd2.major_cd = 'C0012' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_map tom ON tom.target_id = taop.write_year || taop.doc_no || taop.doc_seq -- 조직 매핑 데이터 AND tom.target_type = taop.doc_type AND tom.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_performance tap -- 실적 ON tam.write_year = tap.write_year AND tam.doc_type = tap.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = tap.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = tap.comp_id AND tadp.doc_seq = tap.doc_seq AND tadp.doc_detail_seq = tap.doc_detail_seq AND tom.orgn_id = tap.orgn_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND taop.comp_id = #{compId} AND taop.write_year = #{writeYear} AND taop.use_yn = 'Y' -- 안전보건 목표 상세 (추진 계획 선택 팝업창) 작성년도의 해당 조직이 선택할 수 있는 추진 계획만 표시되어야 함 AND tom.orgn_id = #{orgnId}
GROUP BY tadp.write_year, tadp.doc_type, tadp.doc_no, tadp.doc_seq, tadp.doc_detail_seq, tadp.comp_id, tadp.detail_item_id, tadp.detail_plan, tadp.performance_type, tadp.performance_repeat, tadp.performance_cnt, tadp.performance_custom, tadp.remark, tadp.ord_seq, tadp.use_yn, tadp.action_schedule1, tadp.action_schedule2, tadp.action_schedule3, tadp.action_schedule4, tadp.action_schedule5, tadp.action_schedule6, tadp.action_schedule7, tadp.action_schedule8, tadp.action_schedule9, tadp.action_schedule10, tadp.action_schedule11, tadp.action_schedule12, tadp.created_at, tadp.created_by, tadp.updated_at, tadp.updated_by, taco.company_objective, taco.created_at, taop.action_objective, taop.comp_objective_id, taop.action_schedule1, taop.action_schedule2, taop.action_schedule3, taop.action_schedule4, taop.performance_type, taop.performance_repeat, taop.performance_cnt, taop.performance_custom, taop.doc_seq, taop.write_year, taop.doc_type, taop.use_yn, taop.doc_no, taop.ord_seq, tcd1.minor_nm, tcd2.minor_nm, tadi.detail_item,taop.use_yn,tadp.use_yn ORDER BY taco.created_at, taop.use_yn DESC, write_year_o, taop.ord_seq, doc_seq_o, doc_no_o, tadp.ord_seq, tadp.doc_seq, tadp.doc_detail_seq

SELECT tadp.write_year, tadp.doc_type, tadp.doc_no, tadp.doc_seq, tadp.doc_detail_seq, tadp.comp_id, tadp.detail_item_id, tadp.detail_plan, tadp.performance_type, tadp.performance_repeat, tadp.performance_cnt, tadp.performance_custom, tadp.remark, tadp.ord_seq, tadp.action_schedule1, tadp.action_schedule2, tadp.action_schedule3, tadp.action_schedule4, tadp.action_schedule5, tadp.action_schedule6, tadp.action_schedule7, tadp.action_schedule8, tadp.action_schedule9, tadp.action_schedule10, tadp.action_schedule11, tadp.action_schedule12, tadp.created_at, tadp.created_by, tadp.updated_at, tadp.updated_by, taop.comp_objective_id, taco.company_objective, taop.action_objective, taop.action_schedule1 as action_schedule1_o, taop.action_schedule2 as action_schedule2_o, taop.action_schedule3 as action_schedule3_o, taop.action_schedule4 as action_schedule4_o, taop.performance_type as performance_type_o, taop.performance_repeat as performance_repeat_o, taop.performance_cnt as performance_cnt_o, taop.performance_custom as performance_custom_o, tadi.detail_item, CASE WHEN taop.use_yn = 'N' THEN 'N' WHEN tadp.use_yn = 'N' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS use_yn, COALESCE(SUM(tap.budget), 0) AS budget FROM esg.tb_action_master tam LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_objective_plan taop ON tam.write_year = taop.write_year AND tam.doc_type = taop.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = taop.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = taop.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_plan tadp ON tam.write_year = tadp.write_year AND tam.doc_type = tadp.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = tadp.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = tadp.comp_id AND taop.doc_seq = tadp.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_company_objective taco ON taco.comp_objective_id = taop.comp_objective_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_item tadi on tadi.detail_item_id = tadp.detail_item_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_map tom ON tom.target_id = taop.write_year || taop.doc_no || taop.doc_seq -- 조직 매핑 데이터 AND tom.target_type = taop.doc_type AND tom.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_performance tap -- 실적 ON tam.write_year = tap.write_year AND tam.doc_type = tap.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = tap.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = tap.comp_id AND tadp.doc_seq = tap.doc_seq AND tadp.doc_detail_seq = tap.doc_detail_seq AND tom.orgn_id = tap.orgn_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND taop.comp_id = #{compId} AND taop.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tadp.doc_no = #{docNo} AND tadp.doc_type = #{docType} AND tadp.doc_seq = #{docSeq} AND tadp.detail_item_id = #{searchText} GROUP BY tadp.write_year, tadp.doc_type, tadp.doc_no, tadp.doc_seq, tadp.doc_detail_seq, tadp.comp_id, tadp.detail_item_id, tadp.detail_plan, tadp.performance_type, tadp.performance_repeat, tadp.performance_cnt, tadp.performance_custom, tadp.remark, tadp.ord_seq, tadp.action_schedule1, tadp.action_schedule2, tadp.action_schedule3, tadp.action_schedule4, tadp.action_schedule5, tadp.action_schedule6, tadp.action_schedule7, tadp.action_schedule8, tadp.action_schedule9, tadp.action_schedule10, tadp.action_schedule11, tadp.action_schedule12, tadp.created_at, tadp.created_by, tadp.updated_at, tadp.updated_by, taop.comp_objective_id, taco.company_objective, taop.action_objective, taop.action_schedule1, taop.action_schedule2, taop.action_schedule3, taop.action_schedule4, taop.performance_type, taop.performance_repeat, taop.performance_cnt, taop.performance_custom, taop.use_yn, taop.ord_seq, taop.doc_no, tadi.detail_item,tadp.use_yn ORDER BY taop.use_yn DESC, tadp.use_yn DESC, taop.ord_seq, taop.doc_no, tadp.ord_seq, tadp.doc_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT #{writeYear} as writeYear, LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_detail_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docDetailSeq FROM esg.tb_action_detail_plan WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_seq = #{docSeq}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_action_detail_plan ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, doc_detail_seq, detail_item_id, detail_plan, performance_type, performance_repeat, performance_cnt, performance_custom, remark, ord_seq, use_yn, action_schedule1, action_schedule2, action_schedule3, action_schedule4, action_schedule5, action_schedule6, action_schedule7, action_schedule8, action_schedule9, action_schedule10, action_schedule11, action_schedule12, created_at, created_by, comp_id ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{docDetailSeq}, #{detailItemId}, #{detailPlan}, #{performanceType}, #{performanceRepeat}, #{performanceCnt}, #{performanceCustom}, #{remark}, #{ordSeq}, #{useYn}, #{actionSchedule1}, #{actionSchedule2}, #{actionSchedule3}, #{actionSchedule4}, #{actionSchedule5}, #{actionSchedule6}, #{actionSchedule7}, #{actionSchedule8}, #{actionSchedule9}, #{actionSchedule10}, #{actionSchedule11}, #{actionSchedule12}, now(), #{createdBy}, #{compId} );
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_action_detail_plan SET detail_plan = #{detailPlan}, performance_type = #{performanceType}, performance_repeat = #{performanceRepeat}, performance_cnt = #{performanceCnt}, performance_custom = #{performanceCustom}, remark = #{remark}, ord_seq = #{ordSeq}, use_yn = #{useYn}, action_schedule1 = #{actionSchedule1}, action_schedule2 = #{actionSchedule2}, action_schedule3 = #{actionSchedule3}, action_schedule4 = #{actionSchedule4}, action_schedule5 = #{actionSchedule5}, action_schedule6 = #{actionSchedule6}, action_schedule7 = #{actionSchedule7}, action_schedule8 = #{actionSchedule8}, action_schedule9 = #{actionSchedule9}, action_schedule10 = #{actionSchedule10}, action_schedule11 = #{actionSchedule11}, action_schedule12 = #{actionSchedule12}, comp_id = #{compId}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE 1 = 1 AND write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_seq = #{docSeq} AND doc_detail_seq = #{docDetailSeq}
mapper.insert:
select to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad( (coalesce(max(substring(detail_item_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text, 4, '0' ) as detail_item_id from esg.tb_action_detail_item where detail_item_id like to_char(now(), 'YYYYMMDD') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_action_detail_item( detail_item_id, detail_item, comp_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{detailItemId}, #{detailItem}, #{compId}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT tap.*, taco.comp_objective_id, taco.company_objective, taop.action_objective, taop.created_at, tcd1.minor_nm as performance_type_nm, tcd2.minor_nm as performance_repeat_nm, tadi.detail_item, taop.doc_seq as doc_seq_o, taop.write_year as write_year_o, taop.doc_type as doc_type_o, taop.doc_no as doc_no_o, tom.orgn_id as orgn_id_o, toi.orgn_nm, tadp.detail_item_id, tadp.detail_plan, tadp.doc_detail_seq as doc_detail_seq_o, tadp.performance_type, tadp.performance_repeat, tadp.performance_cnt, tadp.performance_custom, tadp.remark, tadp.ord_seq, tadp.use_yn, tadp.action_schedule1, tadp.action_schedule2, tadp.action_schedule3, tadp.action_schedule4, tadp.action_schedule5, tadp.action_schedule6, tadp.action_schedule7, tadp.action_schedule8, tadp.action_schedule9, tadp.action_schedule10, tadp.action_schedule11, tadp.action_schedule12, tadp.comp_id, COALESCE(SUM(tap.budget), 0) AS budget, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tapd.use_yn = 'Y' THEN tapd.performance_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS performance_amount, tap.created_by FROM esg.tb_action_master tam LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_objective_plan taop ON tam.write_year = taop.write_year AND tam.doc_type = taop.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = taop.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = taop.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_plan tadp ON tam.write_year = tadp.write_year AND tam.doc_type = tadp.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = tadp.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = tadp.comp_id AND taop.doc_seq = tadp.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_company_objective taco ON taco.comp_objective_id = taop.comp_objective_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_item tadi ON tadi.detail_item_id = tadp.detail_item_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d tcd1 ON tadp.performance_type = tcd1.minor_cd AND tcd1.major_cd = 'C0011' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d tcd2 ON tadp.performance_repeat = tcd2.minor_cd AND tcd2.major_cd = 'C0012' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_map tom ON tom.target_id = taop.write_year || taop.doc_no || taop.doc_seq -- 조직 매핑 데이터 AND tom.target_type = taop.doc_type AND tom.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON toi.orgn_id = tom.orgn_id -- 조직별 실적 데이터 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_performance tap -- 실적 ON tam.write_year = tap.write_year AND tam.doc_type = tap.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = tap.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = tap.comp_id AND tadp.doc_seq = tap.doc_seq AND tadp.doc_detail_seq = tap.doc_detail_seq AND tom.orgn_id = tap.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_performance_detail tapd -- 실적증빙자료 ON tap.write_year = tapd.write_year AND tap.doc_type = tapd.doc_type AND tap.doc_no = tapd.doc_no AND tap.comp_id = tapd.comp_id AND tapd.doc_seq = tap.doc_seq AND tapd.doc_detail_seq = tap.doc_detail_seq AND tapd.doc_performance_seq = tap.doc_performance_seq WHERE 1 = 1 AND taop.comp_id = #{compId} AND taop.write_year = #{writeYear} AND taop.use_yn = 'Y' AND tadi.detail_item notnull -- 세부계획에 세부항목이 없을때 필터 AND tadp.use_yn = 'Y'--세부계획 삭제 여부 GROUP BY tadp.detail_item_id, tadp.detail_plan,tadp.doc_detail_seq, tadp.performance_type, tadp.performance_repeat, tadp.performance_cnt, tadp.performance_custom, tadp.remark, tadp.ord_seq, tadp.use_yn, tadp.action_schedule1, tadp.action_schedule2, tadp.action_schedule3, tadp.action_schedule4, tadp.action_schedule5, tadp.action_schedule6, tadp.action_schedule7, tadp.action_schedule8, tadp.action_schedule9, tadp.action_schedule10, tadp.action_schedule11, tadp.action_schedule12, tadp.comp_id,tadp.doc_seq, tap.write_year, tap.doc_no, tap.doc_type, tap.doc_seq, tap.doc_detail_seq,tap.doc_performance_seq, tap.budget, tap.action_performance12, tap.action_performance1, tap.action_performance2, tap.action_performance3, tap.action_performance4,tap.action_performance5, tap.action_performance6,tap.action_performance7, tap.action_performance8, tap.action_performance9, tap.action_performance10,tap.action_performance11, tap.created_at, tap.created_by, tap.updated_at, tap.updated_by, taco.company_objective, taop.action_objective, tadi.detail_item, tadi.detail_item_id, tcd1.minor_nm, tcd2.minor_nm, taop.doc_seq,taop.write_year, taop.doc_type, taop.doc_no, taop.use_yn, taop.ord_seq, tom.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm, toi.ord_seq, taco.comp_objective_id -- ORDER BY taop.use_yn DESC, taop.created_at, tadp.use_yn DESC, taop.write_year, taop.ord_seq, taop.doc_no, tadp.ord_seq, tadp.doc_seq , toi.ord_seq ORDER BY taop.use_yn DESC, tadp.use_yn DESC, taop.write_year, taop.ord_seq, taop.doc_seq, tadi.detail_item_id asc, tadp.ord_seq, tadp.doc_detail_seq asc, toi.ord_seq asc, tap.orgn_id asc

SELECT tap.*, taco.company_objective, taop.action_objective, tcd1.minor_nm as performance_type_nm, tadi.detail_item, taop.doc_seq as doc_seq_o, taop.write_year as write_year_o, taop.doc_type as doc_type_o, taop.doc_no as doc_no_o, tom.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm, tadp.detail_item_id, tadp.detail_plan,tadp.doc_detail_seq as doc_detail_seq_o, tadp.performance_type, tadp.performance_repeat, tadp.performance_cnt, tadp.performance_custom, tadp.remark, tadp.ord_seq, tadp.use_yn, tadp.action_schedule1, tadp.action_schedule2, tadp.action_schedule3, tadp.action_schedule4, tadp.action_schedule5, tadp.action_schedule6, tadp.action_schedule7, tadp.action_schedule8, tadp.action_schedule9, tadp.action_schedule10, tadp.action_schedule11, tadp.action_schedule12, tadp.comp_id, COALESCE(SUM(tap.budget), 0) AS budget, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN tapd.use_yn = 'Y' THEN tapd.performance_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS performance_amount FROM esg.tb_action_master tam LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_objective_plan taop ON tam.write_year = taop.write_year AND tam.doc_type = taop.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = taop.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = taop.comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_plan tadp ON tam.write_year = tadp.write_year AND tam.doc_type = tadp.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = tadp.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = tadp.comp_id AND taop.doc_seq = tadp.doc_seq LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_company_objective taco ON taco.comp_objective_id = taop.comp_objective_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_detail_item tadi ON tadi.detail_item_id = tadp.detail_item_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d tcd1 ON taop.performance_type = tcd1.minor_cd AND tcd1.major_cd = 'C0011' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_map tom ON tom.target_id = taop.write_year || taop.doc_no || taop.doc_seq -- 조직 매핑 데이터 AND tom.target_type = taop.doc_type AND tom.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info toi ON toi.orgn_id = tom.orgn_id -- 조직별 실적 데이터 LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_performance tap -- 실적 ON tam.write_year = tap.write_year AND tam.doc_type = tap.doc_type AND tam.doc_no = tap.doc_no AND tam.comp_id = tap.comp_id AND tadp.doc_seq = tap.doc_seq AND tadp.doc_detail_seq = tap.doc_detail_seq AND tom.orgn_id = tap.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_action_performance_detail tapd -- 실적증빙자료 ON tap.write_year = tapd.write_year AND tap.doc_type = tapd.doc_type AND tap.doc_no = tapd.doc_no AND tap.comp_id = tapd.comp_id AND tapd.doc_seq = tap.doc_seq AND tapd.doc_detail_seq = tap.doc_detail_seq AND tapd.doc_performance_seq = tap.doc_performance_seq WHERE 1 = 1 AND taop.comp_id = #{compId} AND tadp.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tadp.doc_no = #{docNo} AND tadp.doc_type = #{docType} AND tadp.doc_seq = #{docSeq} AND tadp.doc_detail_seq = #{docDetailSeq} AND tap.orgn_id = #{orgnId} GROUP BY tadp.detail_item_id, tadp.detail_plan,tadp.doc_detail_seq, tadp.performance_type, tadp.performance_repeat, tadp.performance_cnt,tadp.performance_custom, tadp.remark, tadp.ord_seq, tadp.use_yn, tadp.action_schedule1, tadp.action_schedule2, tadp.action_schedule3, tadp.action_schedule4, tadp.action_schedule5, tadp.action_schedule6, tadp.action_schedule7, tadp.action_schedule8, tadp.action_schedule9, tadp.action_schedule10, tadp.action_schedule11, tadp.action_schedule12, tadp.comp_id, tap.write_year, tap.doc_no, tap.doc_type, tap.doc_seq, tap.doc_detail_seq,tap.doc_performance_seq, tap.budget, tap.action_performance12, tap.action_performance1, tap.action_performance2, tap.action_performance3, tap.action_performance4,tap.action_performance5, tap.action_performance6,tap.action_performance7, tap.action_performance8, tap.action_performance9, tap.action_performance10,tap.action_performance11, tap.created_at, tap.created_by, tap.updated_at, tap.updated_by, taco.company_objective, taop.action_objective, tadi.detail_item, tcd1.minor_nm, taop.doc_seq,taop.write_year, taop.doc_type, taop.doc_no, tom.orgn_id, toi.orgn_nm
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_performance_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docPerformanceSeq FROM esg.tb_action_performance WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_seq = #{docSeq} AND doc_detail_seq = #{docDetailSeq}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_action_performance ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, doc_detail_seq, doc_performance_seq, comp_id, orgn_id, action_performance1, action_performance2, action_performance3, action_performance4, action_performance5, action_performance6, action_performance7, action_performance8, action_performance9, action_performance10, action_performance11, action_performance12, budget, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{docDetailSeq}, #{docPerformanceSeq}, #{compId}, #{orgnId}, #{actionPerformance1}, #{actionPerformance2}, #{actionPerformance3}, #{actionPerformance4}, #{actionPerformance5}, #{actionPerformance6}, #{actionPerformance7}, #{actionPerformance8}, #{actionPerformance9}, #{actionPerformance10}, #{actionPerformance11}, #{actionPerformance12}, #{budget}, now(), #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO esg.tb_action_performance_hr ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, doc_detail_seq, doc_performance_seq, comp_id, hr_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{docDetailSeq}, #{docPerformanceSeq}, #{compId}, #{id}, now(), #{createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_performance_detail_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docPerformanceDetailSeq FROM esg.tb_action_performance_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_seq = #{docSeq} AND doc_detail_seq = #{docDetailSeq} AND doc_performance_seq = #{docPerformanceSeq}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_action_performance_detail ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, doc_detail_seq, doc_performance_seq, doc_performance_detail_seq, comp_id, ord_seq, contents, performance_amount, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{docDetailSeq}, #{docPerformanceSeq}, #{docPerformanceDetailSeq}, #{compId}, #{ordSeq}, #{contents}, #{performanceAmount}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT t1.comp_id, t1.doc_type, MAX(CASE WHEN t2.action_result1 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END) AS action_result1, MAX(CASE WHEN t2.action_result2 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END) AS action_result2, MAX(CASE WHEN t2.action_result3 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END) AS action_result3, MAX(CASE WHEN t2.action_result4 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END) AS action_result4, MAX(CASE WHEN t2.action_result5 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END) AS action_result5, MAX(CASE WHEN t2.action_result6 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END) AS action_result6, MAX(CASE WHEN t2.action_result7 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END) AS action_result7, MAX(CASE WHEN t2.action_result8 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END) AS action_result8, MAX(CASE WHEN t2.action_result9 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END) AS action_result9, MAX(CASE WHEN t2.action_result10 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END) AS action_result10, MAX(CASE WHEN t2.action_result11 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END) AS action_result11, MAX(CASE WHEN t2.action_result12 = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE NULL END) AS action_result12 FROM esg.tb_safety_health_objectives_detail t1 left join esg.tb_hse_key_performance_result t2 on t1.write_year = t2.write_year and t1.doc_no = t2.doc_no and t1.doc_seq = t2.doc_seq WHERE t1.write_year = #{writeYear} AND t1.action_doc_no = #{docNo} AND t1.action_doc_seq = #{docSeq} AND t1.action_doc_detail_seq = #{docDetailSeq} GROUP BY t1.comp_id, t1.doc_type
